name: Bristol Sportsplex
description: A PPA tour stop, the facility is open to the public and has free open play courts along with affordable programming and reservations. 6 dedicated indoor and 21 dedicated outdoor pickleball courts. Free indoor pickleball open play with bar tab every Tue, Thur, Fri from 7:30-9:30. The family can spend the whole day here with indoor/outdoor Patio Bar & Grill,  Project BBQ restaurant, indoor tennis, volleyball, indoor soccer, outdoor turf soccer field, free gaga ball, free table tennis, free shuffleboard tables, free cornhole, full fitness gym, salt room, and infrared sauna among the amenities open to the public.

name: Celebration Church
description: Come play pickleball at Celebration Church in Blountville, TN! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: Haynesfield Park Pickleball Courts
description: Haynesfield Park Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bristol, TN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like lights and water.

name: Ida Stone Jones Community Tennis Center
description: Ida Stone Jones Community Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Bristol, TN. There are 8 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Kingsport Senior Center
description: Kingsport Senior Center is a place to play pickleball in Kingsport, TN. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Lynn View Community Center
description: Lynn View Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Kingsport, TN. There are 3 hard and wood courts. 2 are indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Must be a member of the community center to play indoors. Outdoor court is free to use.

name: Northeast State Community College
description: Northeast State Community College is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kingsport, TN. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Patterson Park Community Center
description: Patterson Park Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bristol, TN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like water and lights. The courts are free.

name: Riverview Park
description: Riverview Park is a place to play pickleball in Kingsport, TN. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include lights.

name: Slater Community Center
description: Slater Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bristol, TN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Sullivan East High School
description: For student, parent or staff member use only.

name: TNT Sportsplex
description: Come play pickleball at TNT Sportsplex in Borden Village, TN! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: V.O. Dobbins Senior Center
description: V.O. Dobbins Senior Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kingsport, TN. There are 2 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.
